race.comment: The well-related HIGHGROVE ROSE (8) (half to G2 winner Not An Option) was well found in the betting last time out but could only manage to finish seventh over 1600m at Eagle Farm in a disappointing performance. Finds the right race this time and can turn things around. WATERMELON (1) was well fancied last time but could only manage second over 2000m at Sunshine Coast Poly after being well positioned to strike on the corner. Has won at this distance and a bold showing is expected. ARDUOUS (10) is on a quick turnaround after a solid second over 1800m at Sunshine Coast six days ago. Nice run last time and is among the winning hopes. WEONA REDWOOD (2) lines up on the back of a 2 length sixth over 2060m at Doomben. This easier and worth plenty of thought.
